name: bugsweeper
description: A simulator of deployment anxiety in the DOM desert.
author: seto

scripts.start: echo 'Server is not required, just open index.html and enjoy.' && open index.html
scripts.test: echo 'Error: All tests passed by default.' && exit 0
scripts.deploy: git push origin master && echo 'Deploying to production... Just kidding, this is a static page.'
